llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Q1 profit declined 46%, shares crashed 15% to 52-week low. Weak underwriting performance, lower investment income, impact of fire losses and Supreme Court judgment on motor third-party portfolio. Brokerages have mixed ratings: Motilal Oswal downgraded to 'Neutral' with target ₹1,960; Emkay cut target to ₹1,900 but maintained 'Add'.
